# Capstone Tooling

> Binary downloads, installation docs, and agent guidance for the Capstone CLI and MCP server.

Canonical public repository: https://github.com/NxGN-Solutions/capstone-tools

## Core

- [README](README.md): Download matrix, setup overview, versioning, and security model.
- [AGENTS](AGENTS.md): Cross-agent operating instructions for CLI and MCP usage.
- [CLAUDE](CLAUDE.md): Claude Code and Claude Desktop bootstrap guidance.
- [Environment Manifests](environments/): Demo and production tooling versions, release channels, assets, and checksums.

## Skills

- [Capstone CLI Skill](skills/capstone-cli/SKILL.md): Agent workflow guidance for `cap`.
- [Capstone MCP Skill](skills/capstone-mcp/SKILL.md): Agent workflow guidance for `capstone-mcp`.

## CLI Documentation

- [CLI Docs](docs/cli/): CLI usage guide, recipes, and reference documentation.
- [CLI Commands](docs/cli/reference/commands.md): Command reference.
- [CLI Platform Guide](docs/cli/reference/platform-guide.md): Cross-shell syntax and platform notes.
- `cap schema --json` includes `exitCodes`: `0` success, `1` local CLI failure
  or cancellation, `2` validation/client-actionable failure, `3` auth/tenant
  failure, `4` server/API/network/rate-limit/malformed-response failure, `5`
  timeout, and `6` partial result.
- `cap schema --json` includes `upsertIdentity`: flat entities match by exact
  full name only after trimming leading/trailing whitespace, tree entities match
  by exact full path only after trimming leading/trailing whitespace, matching is
  case-sensitive, and Excel upload follows the same identity semantics as JSON
  batch/upsert. Use `upsertIdentity.surfaces` to choose JSON
  `import-json --upsert` or Excel `upload-excel`.
- For rerunnable tenant builds, prefer `import-json --upsert --json` for
  masterdata, model definitions, and widget/dashboard templates before using
  one-item create/save loops.
- Use `cap system tenants snapshot --output snapshot --json` for a reviewable
  export of import-ready JSON files plus `manifest.json`; restore is the
  explicit reviewed `import-json --upsert` path. Use
  `cap workflows show restore-from-snapshot --json` for dry-run, validate,
  apply, and audit steps.
- For post-build analysis checks, pair `cap data recalculation wait <version>
  --json` with `cap reporting computed-values audit --metrics <ids> --strict
  --json`.
- Before live dashboard checks, run `cap templates dashboard-templates audit
  <dashboard-template-id> --strict --json`.

## MCP Documentation

- [MCP Docs](docs/mcp/): MCP setup, recipes, and reference documentation.
- [MCP Setup](docs/mcp/setup.md): Claude Desktop configuration.
- [MCP Tools](docs/mcp/reference/tools.md): MCP tool reference.
- [MCP Resources](docs/mcp/reference/resources.md): MCP resource reference.
- [MCP Prompts](docs/mcp/reference/prompts.md): MCP prompt reference.
